name: Preferential Capital Gains Treatment for ESPP

eligibility.description: Requires holding the shares for at least 2 years from grant and 1 year from exercise; only the original discount (up to 15%) is taxed as ordinary income upon sale.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Converts what would otherwise be ordinary income into long-term capital gains for the appreciation of stock value above the grant date price when holding periods are satisfied.
